mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, user_id, user_name, role, joined_at FROM sys_tenant_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY joined_at ASC
SELECT id, tenant_id, user_id, user_name, role, joined_at FROM sys_tenant_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY joined_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_tenant_user (tenant_id, user_id, user_name, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{role}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_tenant_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId}
